howItWorks.intro: This body fat percentage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Navy Method (Male)
rules.explanation: US Navy body fat estimation from circumference measurements.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: What is a healthy body fat percentage?
faq.a: Men: 10-20%, Women: 18-28%. Athletes are typically lower.
Navy method is ±3% compared to DEXA scans. Best for tracking trends over time.

howWeCalculate.intro: This body fat percentage calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
